items.title: India Cuts Coal Imports as Power Plants Turn to Domestic Fuel
items.description: India is boosting the share of domestic coal used in power plants designated to run on imported fuel, as rising local coal production and expanding renewables have helped to cut coal imports to multi-year lows.
